channel.title: Barkotullah Opu - Dev Daily
channel.description: Dev Daily posts by Barkotullah Opu on full stack development, React, Flutter, and shipping real products.

item.title: How I Structure Small Features for Fast Delivery
item.description: I keep feature scope small, isolate UI and logic clearly, and ship in testable increments so speed does not break maintainability.

item.title: Future Builders Hackathon: My Journey with NSU_MissionX to First Place
item.description: At the Future Builders AI-Driven Cognitive Innovation Hackathon, I worked as one of the three members of NSU_MissionX and led all technical implementation to build our solution under intense time pressure.
